'''fomajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachidonylated|arachidonylated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachidonylated|arachidonylated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fomajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomajithi|fomajithi]] || [[word:fomajiji|fomajiji]] || [[word:fomajishi|fomajishi]] || [[word:fomajiki|fomajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomajuthuthu|fomajuthuthu]] || [[word:fomajujuju|fomajujuju]] || [[word:fomajushushu|fomajushushu]] || [[word:fomajukuku|fomajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomajuthu|fomajuthu]] || [[word:fomajuju|fomajuju]] || [[word:fomajushu|fomajushu]] || [[word:fomajuku|fomajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomajufthuf|fomajufthuf]] || [[word:fomajufjuf|fomajufjuf]] || [[word:fomajufshuf|fomajufshuf]] || [[word:fomajufkuf|fomajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomajethe|fomajethe]] || [[word:fomajeje|fomajeje]] || [[word:fomajeshe|fomajeshe]] || [[word:fomajeke|fomajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomajothotho|fomajothotho]] || [[word:fomajojojo|fomajojojo]] || [[word:fomajoshosho|fomajoshosho]] || [[word:fomajokoko|fomajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomajotho|fomajotho]] || [[word:fomajojo|fomajojo]] || [[word:fomajosho|fomajosho]] || [[word:fomajoko|fomajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomajofthof|fomajofthof]] || [[word:fomajofjof|fomajofjof]] || [[word:fomajofshof|fomajofshof]] || [[word:fomajofkof|fomajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfthÃŸf|fomajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfjÃŸf|fomajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfshÃŸf|fomajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfkÃŸf|fomajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fomajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fomajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fomajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fomajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfthÃŸf|fomajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfjÃŸf|fomajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfshÃŸf|fomajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfkÃŸf|fomajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfthÃŸf|fomajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfjÃŸf|fomajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfshÃŸf|fomajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fomajÃŸfkÃŸf|fomajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fomajÃḊthÃḊ|fomajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fomajÃḊjÃḊ|fomajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fomajÃḊshÃḊ|fomajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fomajÃḊkÃḊ|fomajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fomajathatha|fomajathatha]] || [[word:fomajajaja|fomajajaja]] || [[word:fomajashasha|fomajashasha]] || [[word:fomajakaka|fomajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fomajatha|fomajatha]] || [[word:fomajaja|fomajaja]] || [[word:fomajasha|fomajasha]] || [[word:fomajaka|fomajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fomajafthaf|fomajafthaf]] || [[word:fomajafjaf|fomajafjaf]] || [[word:fomajafshaf|fomajafshaf]] || [[word:fomajafkaf|fomajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fomajasha|fomajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fomajshÃḋsha|fomajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fomajrosha|fomajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fomajmusha|fomajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fomajyasha|fomajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofomajnkshÃḋsha|gofomajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofomajnkrosha|gofomajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofomajnkmusha|gofomajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofomajnkyasha|gofomajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fomamajasha|fomamajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fomamajshÃḋsha|fomamajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fomamajrosha|fomamajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fomamajmusha|fomamajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fomamajyasha|fomamajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofomamajnkshÃḋsha|gofomamajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofomamajnkrosha|gofomamajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofomamajnkmusha|gofomamajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofomamajnkyasha|gofomamajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:femÃḊjasha|femÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:femÃḊjshÃḋsha|femÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:femÃḊjrosha|femÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:femÃḊjmusha|femÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:femÃḊjyasha|femÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofemÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gofemÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofemÃḊjnkrosha|gofemÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofemÃḊjnkmusha|gofemÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofemÃḊjnkyasha|gofemÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fomfajasha|fomfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fomfajshÃḋsha|fomfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fomfajrosha|fomfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fomfajmusha|fomfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fomfajyasha|fomfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofomfajnkshÃḋsha|gofomfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofomfajnkrosha|gofomfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofomfajnkmusha|gofomfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofomfajnkyasha|gofomfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
